channel.title: SShealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SShealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Resilience, Wellness, and Developing Healthier Habits
item.description: Meghan Trainor discusses filtering out public criticism, focusing on her physical health, and building consistent routines that support her well-being.

item.title: What Adequate Daily Hydration Does to the Human Body
Eight Practical Strategies for Meeting Your Daily Protein Requirements
Research Identifies Key Interventions for Supporting Brain Health with Age
item.description: A new study highlights two evidence-based approaches found to be most effective for maintaining cognitive health as people grow older.

item.title: Study Finds a Specific Dietary Addition Can Reduce Blood Pressure
item.description: Research suggests that adding one particular food to the diet can lower blood pressure and also support digestive health.
